extract: Chesnaught (Japanese: ブリガロン Brigarron) is a dual-type Grass/Fighting Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Quilladin starting at level 36. It is the final form of Chespin. Chesnaught can Mega Evolve into Mega Chesnaught using the Chesnaughtite. Mega Chesnaught was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
